category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT wireless device compliance for China-to-UAE export under TRA type approval and ESMA frameworks.

title.en: China-to-UAE Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (TRA Type Approval)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入阿联酋：TRA型号认证合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入阿聯酋：TRA型號認證合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, LoRa, and IoT device documentation against UAE TRA mandatory type approval (ITSEC mark), ESMA Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS), electrical safety to IEC 62368-1 under UAE.S standards (230 V / 50 Hz / Type G), authorized importer and TRA label requirements, and the UAE cybersecurity IA regulatory framework.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙、LoRa及物联网设备文件与阿联酋TRA强制型号认证（ITSEC标志）、ESMA阿联酋合规评估方案（ECAS）、UAE.S标准下的IEC 62368-1电气安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插头）、授权进口商及TRA标签要求，以及阿联酋IA网络安全监管框架的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙、LoRa及物聯網裝置文件與阿聯酋TRA強制型號認證（ITSEC標誌）、ESMA阿聯酋合規評估方案（ECAS）、UAE.S標準下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭）、授權進口商及TRA標籤要求，以及阿聯酋IA網路安全監管框架的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, TRA type approval, ESMA determination, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current UAE telecommunications law, TRA type approval procedures, ESMA product safety requirements, and applicable UAE.S technical standards with qualified regulatory professionals before import or sale in the UAE.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、TRA型号认证、ESMA裁定、法律意见、海关裁决或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于阿联酋销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行阿联酋电信法律、TRA型号认证程序、ESMA产品安全要求及适用UAE.S技术标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、TRA型號認證、ESMA裁定、法律意見、海關裁決或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於阿聯酋銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行阿聯酋電信法律、TRA型號認證程序、ESMA產品安全要求及適用UAE.S技術標準。

answer_first.en: The main UAE gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or IoT wireless device are: (1) TRA mandatory type approval under the UAE Federal Law on Telecommunications — the TRA ITSEC mark and TRA approval number must appear on the device and packaging label before import or sale; (2) EMC testing to ETSI EN 301 489 series submitted as part of the TRA type approval application; (3) ESMA ECAS conformity marking for regulated electrical product categories; (4) electrical safety to IEC 62368-1 under UAE.S standards (230 V / 50 Hz / Type G plug); (5) an authorized TRA-registered importer or dealer; and (6) awareness of UAE IA cybersecurity regulations (mandatory for critical infrastructure, advisory for consumer IoT). Chinese SRRC approval and CCC certification are not recognized by TRA or ESMA. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement applies only within GCC member states.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝或物联网无线设备进入阿联酋的主要差距为：(1) 依据阿联酋《联邦电信法》的TRA强制型号认证 — 进口或销售前须在设备和包装标签上标注TRA ITSEC标志及TRA审批号；(2) 作为TRA型号认证申请一部分提交的ETSI EN 301 489系列EMC测试；(3) 受监管电气产品类别的ESMA ECAS合规标志；(4) UAE.S标准下的IEC 62368-1电气安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插头）；(5) TRA注册授权进口商或经销商；以及(6) 了解阿联酋IA网络安全法规（关键基础设施强制执行，消费者物联网建议参照）。中国SRRC批准和CCC认证不被TRA或ESMA承认。海湾合作委员会（GCC）相互承认协议仅适用于GCC成员国。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩或物聯網無線裝置進入阿聯酋的主要差距為：(1) 依據阿聯酋《聯邦電信法》的TRA強制型號認證 — 進口或銷售前須在裝置和包裝標籤上標注TRA ITSEC標誌及TRA審批號；(2) 作為TRA型號認證申請一部分提交的ETSI EN 301 489系列EMC測試；(3) 受監管電氣產品類別的ESMA ECAS合規標誌；(4) UAE.S標準下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭）；(5) TRA註冊授權進口商或經銷商；以及(6) 了解阿聯酋IA網路安全法規（關鍵基礎設施強制執行，消費者物聯網建議參照）。中國SRRC批准和CCC認證不被TRA或ESMA承認。海灣合作委員會（GCC）相互承認協議僅適用於GCC成員國。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon TRA/ESMA regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
